title: pentaschistis angustifolia var. micranthera
intro: Pentaschistis angustifolia var. micranthera, also known as the mountain grass, is a type of flowering plant found in the mountainous regions of New Zealand. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, with studies suggesting it has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pentaschistis angustifolia var. micranthera include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing with a solvent like ethanol.
